scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @loom/contracts && npm run build -w @loom/test-fixtures && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build -w @loom/contracts && npm run build -w @loom/test-fixtures && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build: npm run build -w @loom/contracts && npm run build -w @loom/test-fixtures && npm run build -w @loom/api
